records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. Those dolls that wouldn't stop moving were becoming a real problem. You saved us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. Those dolls that wouldn't stop moving were becoming a real problem. You saved us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. Those dolls that wouldn't stop moving were becoming a real problem. You saved us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think nothing of it. I only regret that we were late to join you while helping the other ships.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think nothing of it. I only regret that we were late to join you while helping the other ships.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think nothing of it. I only regret that we were late to join you while helping the other ships.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how did you know that the thing embedded in your heart would be effective against them, General Musketeer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how did you know that the thing embedded in your heart would be effective against them, General Musketeer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how did you know that the thing embedded in your heart would be effective against them, General Musketeer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A certain drunken fairy who came to see us in person offered some advice after we treated her to Nordnavik's finest spud ale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A certain drunken fairy who came to see us in person offered some advice after we treated her to Nordnavik's finest spud ale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A certain drunken fairy who came to see us in person offered some advice after we treated her to Nordnavik's finest spud ale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A fairy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A fairy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A fairy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do those really exist?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do those really exist?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do those really exist?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's only what the person in question claims. But given the circumstances, we judged the statement to be quite credible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's only what the person in question claims. But given the circumstances, we judged the statement to be quite credible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's only what the person in question claims. But given the circumstances, we judged the statement to be quite credible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She spoke of Nordnavik's origin history, things even historians don't know, and made predictions about what was yet to come. Every single one proved astonishingly accurate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She spoke of Nordnavik's origin history, things even historians don't know, and made predictions about what was yet to come. Every single one proved astonishingly accurate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She spoke of Nordnavik's origin history, things even historians don't know, and made predictions about what was yet to come. Every single one proved astonishingly accurate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it was a prophecy, does that mean they even knew what would happen here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it was a prophecy, does that mean they even knew what would happen here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it was a prophecy, does that mean they even knew what would happen here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't such a clear message. It was rather vague and open to interpretation in several ways.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't such a clear message. It was rather vague and open to interpretation in several ways.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't such a clear message. It was rather vague and open to interpretation in several ways.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Among it... there was also something about you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Among it... there was also something about you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Among it... there was also something about you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nicole Primer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nicole Primer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nicole Primer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough*

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough...* *Cough...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough...* *Cough...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough...* *Cough...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough...* S-sorry... *Cough...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough...* S-sorry... *Cough...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough...* S-sorry... *Cough...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I said not to call someone's name while they're drinking something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I said not to call someone's name while they're drinking something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I said not to call someone's name while they're drinking something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem... Y-you mean me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem... Y-you mean me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem... Y-you mean me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The fairy said you are the incarnation of Saintess Margarita from the legends who will save Nordnavik.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The fairy said you are the incarnation of Saintess Margarita from the legends who will save Nordnavik.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The fairy said you are the incarnation of Saintess Margarita from the legends who will save Nordnavik.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough*

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A Saintess? Me? That can't be right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A Saintess? Me? That can't be right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A Saintess? Me? That can't be right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you doubt your own identity, we can conduct a cross-check right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you doubt your own identity, we can conduct a cross-check right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you doubt your own identity, we can conduct a cross-check right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Has anyone here witnessed this young lady's bullets missing their target?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Has anyone here witnessed this young lady's bullets missing their target?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Has anyone here witnessed this young lady's bullets missing their target?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...She's fired at least around a hundred shots, I think...
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...She's fired at least around a hundred shots, I think...
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...She's fired at least around a hundred shots, I think...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Some of them got back up afterward, but I don't recall any of them actually missing, do you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Some of them got back up afterward, but I don't recall any of them actually missing, do you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Some of them got back up afterward, but I don't recall any of them actually missing, do you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen one miss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen one miss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen one miss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That settles the verification.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That settles the verification.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That settles the verification.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a moment. Just like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait a moment. Just like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a moment. Just like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given the situation, please understand that the verification had to be conducted in a simplified manner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given the situation, please understand that the verification had to be conducted in a simplified manner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given the situation, please understand that the verification had to be conducted in a simplified manner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I may add my personal opinion, the fact that you possess unfailing demon bullets alone already places you far beyond the bounds of normal people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I may add my personal opinion, the fact that you possess unfailing demon bullets alone already places you far beyond the bounds of normal people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I may add my personal opinion, the fact that you possess unfailing demon bullets alone already places you far beyond the bounds of normal people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't deny that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't deny that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't deny that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's amazing. I miss my shots all the time when I shoot things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's amazing. I miss my shots all the time when I shoot things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's amazing. I miss my shots all the time when I shoot things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In any case, we received a revelation that we are to assist you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In any case, we received a revelation that we are to assist you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In any case, we received a revelation that we are to assist you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From that... fairy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: From that... fairy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: From that... fairy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't really know anything about this Margarita person. What exactly am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't really know anything about this Margarita person. What exactly am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't really know anything about this Margarita person. What exactly am I supposed to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Margarita offered up what was most precious to her for the sake of Nordnavik's ancestors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Margarita offered up what was most precious to her for the sake of Nordnavik's ancestors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Margarita offered up what was most precious to her for the sake of Nordnavik's ancestors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because of that, the path for a nation's birth and survival was opened. So her descendants naturally have a duty to assist her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of that, the path for a nation's birth and survival was opened. So her descendants naturally have a duty to assist her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of that, the path for a nation's birth and survival was opened. So her descendants naturally have a duty to assist her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that you may recover what you have lost that was most precious to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that you may recover what you have lost that was most precious to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that you may recover what you have lost that was most precious to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What is this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What is this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What is this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I... here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I... here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I... here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've finally awakened, little queen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've finally awakened, little queen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've finally awakened, little queen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do you know me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Do you know me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Do you know me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I know you well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I know you well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I know you well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are the little queen who ruled over ancient Avalon and the Stump...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are the little queen who ruled over ancient Avalon and the Stump...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are the little queen who ruled over ancient Avalon and the Stump...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the one who will slay the Demon Lord Thagirion today. Our savior.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the one who will slay the Demon Lord Thagirion today. Our savior.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the one who will slay the Demon Lord Thagirion today. Our savior.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place... is the Promised Land, the world after death?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place... is the Promised Land, the world after death?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place... is the Promised Land, the world after death?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you, and everyone else here... are all people who have already died?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you, and everyone else here... are all people who have already died?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you, and everyone else here... are all people who have already died?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our world has already been destroyed once by the Demon Lord's hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our world has already been destroyed once by the Demon Lord's hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our world has already been destroyed once by the Demon Lord's hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So in the end... I couldn't protect the Stump, or my friend... Not a single thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So in the end... I couldn't protect the Stump, or my friend... Not a single thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So in the end... I couldn't protect the Stump, or my friend... Not a single thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lugh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lugh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lugh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't blame yourself so harshly. None of us that day were able to protect the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't blame yourself so harshly. None of us that day were able to protect the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't blame yourself so harshly. None of us that day were able to protect the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And in the end, we've been given another chance like this to take our revenge, haven't we?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And in the end, we've been given another chance like this to take our revenge, haven't we?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And in the end, we've been given another chance like this to take our revenge, haven't we?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The land and sky here are so quiet and peaceful. Have you all really been dreaming of revenge in a place like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The land and sky here are so quiet and peaceful. Have you all really been dreaming of revenge in a place like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The land and sky here are so quiet and peaceful. Have you all really been dreaming of revenge in a place like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you resent the Demon Lord who destroyed your world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you resent the Demon Lord who destroyed your world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you resent the Demon Lord who destroyed your world?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course I do...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course I do...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course I do...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naturally I resent her. She did that to my home... and to my friend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naturally I resent her. She did that to my home... and to my friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naturally I resent her. She did that to my home... and to my friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The destruction of the world isn't something to fear so much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The destruction of the world isn't something to fear so much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The destruction of the world isn't something to fear so much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we can complete Avalon's Gate so that the children of the Stump can carry on our civilization.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we can complete Avalon's Gate so that the children of the Stump can carry on our civilization.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we can complete Avalon's Gate so that the children of the Stump can carry on our civilization.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...We have a mission more important than revenge. The continuation of our civilization.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...We have a mission more important than revenge. The continuation of our civilization.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...We have a mission more important than revenge. The continuation of our civilization.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, that really does sound like something our savior would say.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, that really does sound like something our savior would say.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, that really does sound like something our savior would say.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm truly glad you haven't become like us, stained by the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm truly glad you haven't become like us, stained by the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm truly glad you haven't become like us, stained by the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I defeat Thagirion like you said, will everyone be able to live happily?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I defeat Thagirion like you said, will everyone be able to live happily?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I defeat Thagirion like you said, will everyone be able to live happily?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You could be happy... but you wouldn't be able to live.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You could be happy... but you wouldn't be able to live.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You could be happy... but you wouldn't be able to live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we are already people who died once. People from a destroyed world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because we are already people who died once. People from a destroyed world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we are already people who died once. People from a destroyed world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there are still people who are alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there are still people who are alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there are still people who are alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The descendants of the Stump that you left behind, who came through Avalon's Gate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The descendants of the Stump that you left behind, who came through Avalon's Gate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The descendants of the Stump that you left behind, who came through Avalon's Gate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those descendants who rebuilt Avalon are coming here now to protect the world from the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those descendants who rebuilt Avalon are coming here now to protect the world from the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those descendants who rebuilt Avalon are coming here now to protect the world from the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: People are walking in lines.
records.m_Talk_DEU: People are walking in lines.
records.m_Talk_FRA: People are walking in lines.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where are they all going?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where are they all going?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where are they all going?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're going to pray to the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're going to pray to the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're going to pray to the Golden Tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The prophesied day when the Promised Land will be completed... is not far off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The prophesied day when the Promised Land will be completed... is not far off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The prophesied day when the Promised Land will be completed... is not far off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why do we need a complete Promised Land? I already like things the way they are now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why do we need a complete Promised Land? I already like things the way they are now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why do we need a complete Promised Land? I already like things the way they are now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Humans are greedy, so they can never fulfill every wish they have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Humans are greedy, so they can never fulfill every wish they have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Humans are greedy, so they can never fulfill every wish they have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we hang our greatest wish upon that Golden Tree, and live on while being content with our smaller wishes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we hang our greatest wish upon that Golden Tree, and live on while being content with our smaller wishes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we hang our greatest wish upon that Golden Tree, and live on while being content with our smaller wishes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... if something can never be fulfilled, can it really be called a wish?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... if something can never be fulfilled, can it really be called a wish?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... if something can never be fulfilled, can it really be called a wish?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. So they're going to retrieve the greatest wish they left hanging on the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. So they're going to retrieve the greatest wish they left hanging on the Golden Tree.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. So they're going to retrieve the greatest wish they left hanging on the Golden Tree.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And most of these pilgrims carry the wish that they might be forgiven for the sins of their past lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And most of these pilgrims carry the wish that they might be forgiven for the sins of their past lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And most of these pilgrims carry the wish that they might be forgiven for the sins of their past lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though they know the past cannot be changed by any wish... they walk on, endlessly atoning day after day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though they know the past cannot be changed by any wish... they walk on, endlessly atoning day after day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though they know the past cannot be changed by any wish... they walk on, endlessly atoning day after day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think what I want is hanging on the Golden Tree too?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think what I want is hanging on the Golden Tree too?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think what I want is hanging on the Golden Tree too?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well now. Your greatest wish is something you must ask yourself, not me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well now. Your greatest wish is something you must ask yourself, not me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well now. Your greatest wish is something you must ask yourself, not me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does happiness mean to you, Clara?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does happiness mean to you, Clara?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does happiness mean to you, Clara?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just... being able to feel things as they are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just... being able to feel things as they are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just... being able to feel things as they are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tasting good food, and smiling at happy things. I like things just the way they are now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tasting good food, and smiling at happy things. I like things just the way they are now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tasting good food, and smiling at happy things. I like things just the way they are now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So before coming here, you weren't able to feel things like that freely. Why was that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So before coming here, you weren't able to feel things like that freely. Why was that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So before coming here, you weren't able to feel things like that freely. Why was that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: One by one, the things I had started disappearing. The way to taste things... and even the way to feel happiness...
records.m_Talk_DEU: One by one, the things I had started disappearing. The way to taste things... and even the way to feel happiness...
records.m_Talk_FRA: One by one, the things I had started disappearing. The way to taste things... and even the way to feel happiness...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And also...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And also...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And also...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Clara?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Clara?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Clara?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, dear? You're crying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, dear? You're crying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, dear? You're crying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remembered... something I had forgotten...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remembered... something I had forgotten...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remembered... something I had forgotten...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's so faint that I forgot it again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's so faint that I forgot it again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's so faint that I forgot it again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't try too hard to remember. When the time comes, it will return to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't try too hard to remember. When the time comes, it will return to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't try too hard to remember. When the time comes, it will return to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no such thing as a memory that sinks away forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no such thing as a memory that sinks away forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no such thing as a memory that sinks away forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the meantime, how about going to pick some flowers for your friend?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the meantime, how about going to pick some flowers for your friend?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the meantime, how about going to pick some flowers for your friend?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You picked quite a lot again today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You picked quite a lot again today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You picked quite a lot again today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope your friend will like them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope your friend will like them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope your friend will like them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My friend is rough-tempered. When it's awake, it's always angry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My friend is rough-tempered. When it's awake, it's always angry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My friend is rough-tempered. When it's awake, it's always angry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Actually, things like the flowers and fruit I like... my friend might not like them very much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Actually, things like the flowers and fruit I like... my friend might not like them very much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Actually, things like the flowers and fruit I like... my friend might not like them very much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it interesting? Even people who have nothing in common can still become friends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it interesting? Even people who have nothing in common can still become friends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it interesting? Even people who have nothing in common can still become friends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we made a promise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we made a promise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we made a promise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like bad adults do, we wouldn't hurt each other just because we're different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like bad adults do, we wouldn't hurt each other just because we're different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like bad adults do, we wouldn't hurt each other just because we're different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason my friend hasn't woken up yet... is probably because of that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason my friend hasn't woken up yet... is probably because of that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason my friend hasn't woken up yet... is probably because of that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It must be afraid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must be afraid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must be afraid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Afraid that its roughness might accidentally destroy your happiness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Afraid that its roughness might accidentally destroy your happiness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Afraid that its roughness might accidentally destroy your happiness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so... I don't want my friend to stay asleep forever just because of my happiness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so... I don't want my friend to stay asleep forever just because of my happiness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so... I don't want my friend to stay asleep forever just because of my happiness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If one side has to change themselves and make a sacrifice, then that isn't happiness for either of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If one side has to change themselves and make a sacrifice, then that isn't happiness for either of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If one side has to change themselves and make a sacrifice, then that isn't happiness for either of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps a Promised Land for everyone... was never something that could exist in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps a Promised Land for everyone... was never something that could exist in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps a Promised Land for everyone... was never something that could exist in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something cold is falling again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something cold is falling again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something cold is falling again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's snow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's snow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's snow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing it fall this heavily, it seems winter has truly arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing it fall this heavily, it seems winter has truly arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing it fall this heavily, it seems winter has truly arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Winter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Winter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Winter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's go together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's go together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's go together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I remember now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I remember now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I remember now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's somewhere I have to go back to. I need to hurry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's somewhere I have to go back to. I need to hurry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's somewhere I have to go back to. I need to hurry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure you'll be all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure you'll be all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure you'll be all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you return, you'll have to leave behind every wish you've fulfilled here until now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you return, you'll have to leave behind every wish you've fulfilled here until now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you return, you'll have to leave behind every wish you've fulfilled here until now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My greatest wish isn't here anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My greatest wish isn't here anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My greatest wish isn't here anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know where the door that leads outside is. But it's dangerous to open it alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know where the door that leads outside is. But it's dangerous to open it alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know where the door that leads outside is. But it's dangerous to open it alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As it happens, there are others who also wish to leave this place, so you should go with them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As it happens, there are others who also wish to leave this place, so you should go with them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As it happens, there are others who also wish to leave this place, so you should go with them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Louise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Louise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Louise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. Those dolls that wouldn't stop moving were becoming a real problem. You saved us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. Those dolls that wouldn't stop moving were becoming a real problem. You saved us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. Those dolls that wouldn't stop moving were becoming a real problem. You saved us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Think nothing of it. I only regret that we were late to join you while helping the other ships.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Think nothing of it. I only regret that we were late to join you while helping the other ships.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Think nothing of it. I only regret that we were late to join you while helping the other ships.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But how did you know that the thing embedded in your heart would be effective against them, General Musketeer?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But how did you know that the thing embedded in your heart would be effective against them, General Musketeer?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But how did you know that the thing embedded in your heart would be effective against them, General Musketeer?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A certain drunken fairy who came to see us in person offered some advice after we treated her to Nordnavik's finest spud ale.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A certain drunken fairy who came to see us in person offered some advice after we treated her to Nordnavik's finest spud ale.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A certain drunken fairy who came to see us in person offered some advice after we treated her to Nordnavik's finest spud ale.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A fairy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A fairy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A fairy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do those really exist?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do those really exist?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do those really exist?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's only what the person in question claims. But given the circumstances, we judged the statement to be quite credible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's only what the person in question claims. But given the circumstances, we judged the statement to be quite credible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's only what the person in question claims. But given the circumstances, we judged the statement to be quite credible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She spoke of Nordnavik's origin history, things even historians don't know, and made predictions about what was yet to come. Every single one proved astonishingly accurate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She spoke of Nordnavik's origin history, things even historians don't know, and made predictions about what was yet to come. Every single one proved astonishingly accurate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She spoke of Nordnavik's origin history, things even historians don't know, and made predictions about what was yet to come. Every single one proved astonishingly accurate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it was a prophecy, does that mean they even knew what would happen here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it was a prophecy, does that mean they even knew what would happen here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it was a prophecy, does that mean they even knew what would happen here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't such a clear message. It was rather vague and open to interpretation in several ways.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't such a clear message. It was rather vague and open to interpretation in several ways.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't such a clear message. It was rather vague and open to interpretation in several ways.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Among it... there was also something about you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Among it... there was also something about you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Among it... there was also something about you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nicole Primer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nicole Primer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nicole Primer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough*

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough...* *Cough...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough...* *Cough...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough...* *Cough...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough...* S-sorry... *Cough...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough...* S-sorry... *Cough...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough...* S-sorry... *Cough...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I said not to call someone's name while they're drinking something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I said not to call someone's name while they're drinking something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I said not to call someone's name while they're drinking something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem... Y-you mean me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem... Y-you mean me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem... Y-you mean me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The fairy said you are the incarnation of Saintess Margarita from the legends who will save Nordnavik.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The fairy said you are the incarnation of Saintess Margarita from the legends who will save Nordnavik.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The fairy said you are the incarnation of Saintess Margarita from the legends who will save Nordnavik.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough*

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...A Saintess? Me? That can't be right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...A Saintess? Me? That can't be right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...A Saintess? Me? That can't be right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you doubt your own identity, we can conduct a cross-check right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you doubt your own identity, we can conduct a cross-check right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you doubt your own identity, we can conduct a cross-check right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Has anyone here witnessed this young lady's bullets missing their target?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Has anyone here witnessed this young lady's bullets missing their target?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Has anyone here witnessed this young lady's bullets missing their target?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...She's fired at least around a hundred shots, I think...
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...She's fired at least around a hundred shots, I think...
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...She's fired at least around a hundred shots, I think...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Some of them got back up afterward, but I don't recall any of them actually missing, do you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Some of them got back up afterward, but I don't recall any of them actually missing, do you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Some of them got back up afterward, but I don't recall any of them actually missing, do you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen one miss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen one miss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen one miss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That settles the verification.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That settles the verification.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That settles the verification.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait a moment. Just like that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait a moment. Just like that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait a moment. Just like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Given the situation, please understand that the verification had to be conducted in a simplified manner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Given the situation, please understand that the verification had to be conducted in a simplified manner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Given the situation, please understand that the verification had to be conducted in a simplified manner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I may add my personal opinion, the fact that you possess unfailing demon bullets alone already places you far beyond the bounds of normal people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I may add my personal opinion, the fact that you possess unfailing demon bullets alone already places you far beyond the bounds of normal people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I may add my personal opinion, the fact that you possess unfailing demon bullets alone already places you far beyond the bounds of normal people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't deny that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't deny that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't deny that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's amazing. I miss my shots all the time when I shoot things.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's amazing. I miss my shots all the time when I shoot things.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's amazing. I miss my shots all the time when I shoot things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In any case, we received a revelation that we are to assist you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In any case, we received a revelation that we are to assist you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In any case, we received a revelation that we are to assist you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From that... fairy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: From that... fairy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: From that... fairy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't really know anything about this Margarita person. What exactly am I supposed to do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't really know anything about this Margarita person. What exactly am I supposed to do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't really know anything about this Margarita person. What exactly am I supposed to do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Margarita offered up what was most precious to her for the sake of Nordnavik's ancestors.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Margarita offered up what was most precious to her for the sake of Nordnavik's ancestors.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Margarita offered up what was most precious to her for the sake of Nordnavik's ancestors.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because of that, the path for a nation's birth and survival was opened. So her descendants naturally have a duty to assist her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because of that, the path for a nation's birth and survival was opened. So her descendants naturally have a duty to assist her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because of that, the path for a nation's birth and survival was opened. So her descendants naturally have a duty to assist her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that you may recover what you have lost that was most precious to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that you may recover what you have lost that was most precious to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that you may recover what you have lost that was most precious to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...What is this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...What is this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...What is this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I... here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I... here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I... here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've finally awakened, little queen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've finally awakened, little queen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've finally awakened, little queen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do you know me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Do you know me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Do you know me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I know you well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I know you well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I know you well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are the little queen who ruled over ancient Avalon and the Stump...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are the little queen who ruled over ancient Avalon and the Stump...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are the little queen who ruled over ancient Avalon and the Stump...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the one who will slay the Demon Lord Thagirion today. Our savior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the one who will slay the Demon Lord Thagirion today. Our savior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the one who will slay the Demon Lord Thagirion today. Our savior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This place... is the Promised Land, the world after death?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This place... is the Promised Land, the world after death?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This place... is the Promised Land, the world after death?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then you, and everyone else here... are all people who have already died?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then you, and everyone else here... are all people who have already died?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then you, and everyone else here... are all people who have already died?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our world has already been destroyed once by the Demon Lord's hand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our world has already been destroyed once by the Demon Lord's hand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our world has already been destroyed once by the Demon Lord's hand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So in the end... I couldn't protect the Stump, or my friend... Not a single thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So in the end... I couldn't protect the Stump, or my friend... Not a single thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So in the end... I couldn't protect the Stump, or my friend... Not a single thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lugh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lugh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lugh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't blame yourself so harshly. None of us that day were able to protect the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't blame yourself so harshly. None of us that day were able to protect the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't blame yourself so harshly. None of us that day were able to protect the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And in the end, we've been given another chance like this to take our revenge, haven't we?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And in the end, we've been given another chance like this to take our revenge, haven't we?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And in the end, we've been given another chance like this to take our revenge, haven't we?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The land and sky here are so quiet and peaceful. Have you all really been dreaming of revenge in a place like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The land and sky here are so quiet and peaceful. Have you all really been dreaming of revenge in a place like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The land and sky here are so quiet and peaceful. Have you all really been dreaming of revenge in a place like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you resent the Demon Lord who destroyed your world?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you resent the Demon Lord who destroyed your world?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you resent the Demon Lord who destroyed your world?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course I do...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course I do...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course I do...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Naturally I resent her. She did that to my home... and to my friend.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Naturally I resent her. She did that to my home... and to my friend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Naturally I resent her. She did that to my home... and to my friend.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The destruction of the world isn't something to fear so much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The destruction of the world isn't something to fear so much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The destruction of the world isn't something to fear so much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we can complete Avalon's Gate so that the children of the Stump can carry on our civilization.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we can complete Avalon's Gate so that the children of the Stump can carry on our civilization.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we can complete Avalon's Gate so that the children of the Stump can carry on our civilization.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...We have a mission more important than revenge. The continuation of our civilization.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...We have a mission more important than revenge. The continuation of our civilization.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...We have a mission more important than revenge. The continuation of our civilization.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, that really does sound like something our savior would say.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, that really does sound like something our savior would say.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, that really does sound like something our savior would say.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm truly glad you haven't become like us, stained by the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm truly glad you haven't become like us, stained by the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm truly glad you haven't become like us, stained by the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I defeat Thagirion like you said, will everyone be able to live happily?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I defeat Thagirion like you said, will everyone be able to live happily?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I defeat Thagirion like you said, will everyone be able to live happily?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You could be happy... but you wouldn't be able to live.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You could be happy... but you wouldn't be able to live.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You could be happy... but you wouldn't be able to live.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because we are already people who died once. People from a destroyed world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because we are already people who died once. People from a destroyed world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because we are already people who died once. People from a destroyed world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But there are still people who are alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But there are still people who are alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But there are still people who are alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The descendants of the Stump that you left behind, who came through Avalon's Gate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The descendants of the Stump that you left behind, who came through Avalon's Gate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The descendants of the Stump that you left behind, who came through Avalon's Gate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those descendants who rebuilt Avalon are coming here now to protect the world from the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those descendants who rebuilt Avalon are coming here now to protect the world from the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those descendants who rebuilt Avalon are coming here now to protect the world from the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: People are walking in lines.
root.m_Talk_DEU: People are walking in lines.
root.m_Talk_FRA: People are walking in lines.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where are they all going?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where are they all going?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where are they all going?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They're going to pray to the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They're going to pray to the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're going to pray to the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The prophesied day when the Promised Land will be completed... is not far off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The prophesied day when the Promised Land will be completed... is not far off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The prophesied day when the Promised Land will be completed... is not far off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why do we need a complete Promised Land? I already like things the way they are now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why do we need a complete Promised Land? I already like things the way they are now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why do we need a complete Promised Land? I already like things the way they are now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Humans are greedy, so they can never fulfill every wish they have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Humans are greedy, so they can never fulfill every wish they have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Humans are greedy, so they can never fulfill every wish they have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we hang our greatest wish upon that Golden Tree, and live on while being content with our smaller wishes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we hang our greatest wish upon that Golden Tree, and live on while being content with our smaller wishes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we hang our greatest wish upon that Golden Tree, and live on while being content with our smaller wishes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... if something can never be fulfilled, can it really be called a wish?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... if something can never be fulfilled, can it really be called a wish?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... if something can never be fulfilled, can it really be called a wish?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm. So they're going to retrieve the greatest wish they left hanging on the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm. So they're going to retrieve the greatest wish they left hanging on the Golden Tree.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm. So they're going to retrieve the greatest wish they left hanging on the Golden Tree.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And most of these pilgrims carry the wish that they might be forgiven for the sins of their past lives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And most of these pilgrims carry the wish that they might be forgiven for the sins of their past lives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And most of these pilgrims carry the wish that they might be forgiven for the sins of their past lives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even though they know the past cannot be changed by any wish... they walk on, endlessly atoning day after day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even though they know the past cannot be changed by any wish... they walk on, endlessly atoning day after day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even though they know the past cannot be changed by any wish... they walk on, endlessly atoning day after day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think what I want is hanging on the Golden Tree too?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think what I want is hanging on the Golden Tree too?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think what I want is hanging on the Golden Tree too?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well now. Your greatest wish is something you must ask yourself, not me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well now. Your greatest wish is something you must ask yourself, not me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well now. Your greatest wish is something you must ask yourself, not me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What does happiness mean to you, Clara?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What does happiness mean to you, Clara?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What does happiness mean to you, Clara?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just... being able to feel things as they are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just... being able to feel things as they are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just... being able to feel things as they are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tasting good food, and smiling at happy things. I like things just the way they are now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tasting good food, and smiling at happy things. I like things just the way they are now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tasting good food, and smiling at happy things. I like things just the way they are now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So before coming here, you weren't able to feel things like that freely. Why was that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So before coming here, you weren't able to feel things like that freely. Why was that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So before coming here, you weren't able to feel things like that freely. Why was that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: One by one, the things I had started disappearing. The way to taste things... and even the way to feel happiness...
root.m_Talk_DEU: One by one, the things I had started disappearing. The way to taste things... and even the way to feel happiness...
root.m_Talk_FRA: One by one, the things I had started disappearing. The way to taste things... and even the way to feel happiness...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And also...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And also...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And also...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Clara?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Clara?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Clara?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, dear? You're crying.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, dear? You're crying.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, dear? You're crying.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I remembered... something I had forgotten...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I remembered... something I had forgotten...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I remembered... something I had forgotten...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's so faint that I forgot it again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's so faint that I forgot it again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's so faint that I forgot it again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't try too hard to remember. When the time comes, it will return to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't try too hard to remember. When the time comes, it will return to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't try too hard to remember. When the time comes, it will return to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no such thing as a memory that sinks away forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no such thing as a memory that sinks away forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no such thing as a memory that sinks away forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the meantime, how about going to pick some flowers for your friend?
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the meantime, how about going to pick some flowers for your friend?
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the meantime, how about going to pick some flowers for your friend?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You picked quite a lot again today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You picked quite a lot again today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You picked quite a lot again today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope your friend will like them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope your friend will like them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope your friend will like them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My friend is rough-tempered. When it's awake, it's always angry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My friend is rough-tempered. When it's awake, it's always angry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My friend is rough-tempered. When it's awake, it's always angry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Actually, things like the flowers and fruit I like... my friend might not like them very much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Actually, things like the flowers and fruit I like... my friend might not like them very much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Actually, things like the flowers and fruit I like... my friend might not like them very much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it interesting? Even people who have nothing in common can still become friends.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it interesting? Even people who have nothing in common can still become friends.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it interesting? Even people who have nothing in common can still become friends.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why we made a promise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why we made a promise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why we made a promise.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like bad adults do, we wouldn't hurt each other just because we're different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like bad adults do, we wouldn't hurt each other just because we're different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like bad adults do, we wouldn't hurt each other just because we're different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason my friend hasn't woken up yet... is probably because of that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason my friend hasn't woken up yet... is probably because of that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason my friend hasn't woken up yet... is probably because of that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It must be afraid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It must be afraid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It must be afraid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Afraid that its roughness might accidentally destroy your happiness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Afraid that its roughness might accidentally destroy your happiness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Afraid that its roughness might accidentally destroy your happiness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so... I don't want my friend to stay asleep forever just because of my happiness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so... I don't want my friend to stay asleep forever just because of my happiness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so... I don't want my friend to stay asleep forever just because of my happiness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If one side has to change themselves and make a sacrifice, then that isn't happiness for either of them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If one side has to change themselves and make a sacrifice, then that isn't happiness for either of them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If one side has to change themselves and make a sacrifice, then that isn't happiness for either of them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps a Promised Land for everyone... was never something that could exist in the first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps a Promised Land for everyone... was never something that could exist in the first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps a Promised Land for everyone... was never something that could exist in the first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Something cold is falling again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Something cold is falling again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Something cold is falling again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's snow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's snow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's snow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing it fall this heavily, it seems winter has truly arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing it fall this heavily, it seems winter has truly arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing it fall this heavily, it seems winter has truly arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Winter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Winter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Winter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Is it okay for you to come with me and not stay here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd wants to see the night sky with twinkling snow, together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's go together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's go together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's go together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I remember now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I remember now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I remember now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's somewhere I have to go back to. I need to hurry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's somewhere I have to go back to. I need to hurry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's somewhere I have to go back to. I need to hurry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sure you'll be all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sure you'll be all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sure you'll be all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you return, you'll have to leave behind every wish you've fulfilled here until now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you return, you'll have to leave behind every wish you've fulfilled here until now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you return, you'll have to leave behind every wish you've fulfilled here until now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My greatest wish isn't here anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My greatest wish isn't here anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My greatest wish isn't here anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know where the door that leads outside is. But it's dangerous to open it alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know where the door that leads outside is. But it's dangerous to open it alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know where the door that leads outside is. But it's dangerous to open it alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As it happens, there are others who also wish to leave this place, so you should go with them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As it happens, there are others who also wish to leave this place, so you should go with them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As it happens, there are others who also wish to leave this place, so you should go with them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Louise.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Louise.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Louise.
